## Earnie 2.1.0-alpha.2

Debug / Synology follow-up after `2.1.0-alpha.1`. For local/hostname UI checks — not `:latest`.

Pin the image:

```text
ghcr.io/jochentcc/earnie-energy:2.1.0-alpha.2
```

Compose stacks that use `:latest` stay on the last official **2.0.0**.

### Highlights

- **Monitor mobile chunk load** — one-shot hard-reload when Streamlit fails to fetch stale `/static/js/*` chunks (`ui/chunk_load_recovery.py`); temporary debug probe removed after live verification

### Docker images

- `ghcr.io/jochentcc/earnie-energy:2.1.0-alpha.2`
- Legacy alias: `ghcr.io/jochentcc/ernie-energy:2.1.0-alpha.2`
- **No** `:latest` for this tag

Multi-arch: `linux/amd64` (Synology / Proxmox) · `linux/arm64` (LoxBerry).

### Known issues

- **EV FertigUm (config path)** — fix implemented; live verification still pending
- **EV charge while not connected** — open (local debug dump)
- **Weekend ready-by 12:00** — open check for Start/End-SOC constraints

See [backlog/Backlog-Bugfixes.md](https://github.com/JochenTCC/Earnie/blob/main/backlog/Backlog-Bugfixes.md).
